articles.summary: Toppoint Holdings Inc. (NYSE: TOPP) has secured $4.15 million in gross proceeds through a private placement of 5,000,000 common shares at $0.83 per share. The closing of this transaction is expected around May 28, 2026, with the shares issued under exemptions from SEC registration.

articles.title: Cboe hires Boudewijn Duinstra as chief risk officer By Investing.com
articles.summary: Cboe Global Markets has announced the hiring of Boudewijn Duinstra as Executive Vice President and Chief Risk Officer. Duinstra, with over 30 years of experience in risk management and derivatives, will lead Cboe's global risk management function from its Chicago headquarters and Amsterdam. The announcement comes as Cboe's shares trade at a 52-week high, with the company maintaining a "GREAT" financial health score and an 11-year streak of dividend increases.

articles.title: Moody's Corporation stock (US6153691059): earnings momentum and AI ambitions attract attention
articles.summary: Moody's Corporation has shown solid recent earnings and is expanding into AI-powered analytics and risk solutions, driven by demand for its tools and a recovering bond market. The company, known for its credit ratings and analytics, is also focusing on ESG and climate risk assessments. Its strategy involves integrating traditional ratings expertise with modern analytics and digital delivery, attracting investors looking for exposure to capital markets infrastructure and digital transformation.

articles.title: Synopsys Stock Slips Despite Q2 Earnings Beat
articles.summary: Synopsys (NASDAQ:SNPS) reported strong Q2 earnings, beating Street estimates with $3.35 per share and revenue of $2.28 billion. The company also raised its fiscal 2026 EPS and revenue guidance, attributing growth to increasing AI-driven semiconductor demand. Despite the positive results, Synopsys stock experienced a 2.45% slip in extended trading.
articles.content: Synopsys (NASDAQ:SNPS) reported strong Q2 earnings, beating Street estimates with $3.35 per share and revenue of $2.28 billion. The company also raised its fiscal 2026 EPS and revenue guidance, attributing growth to increasing AI-driven semiconductor demand. Despite the positive results, Synopsys stock experienced a 2.45% slip in extended trading.

articles.title: Synopsys to Add Elliott Partner to Board
articles.summary: Synopsys will add Jesse Cohn, a managing partner at activist investor Elliott Investment Management, to its board of directors. Cohn's appointment, effective June 1, is part of an agreement between Synopsys and Elliott and will expand the board to 11 members, with Cohn also joining the corporate governance and nominating committee.
articles.content: Synopsys will add Jesse Cohn, a managing partner at activist investor Elliott Investment Management, to its board of directors. Cohn's appointment, effective June 1, is part of an agreement between Synopsys and Elliott and will expand the board to 11 members, with Cohn also joining the corporate governance and nominating committee.

articles.title: HP: Fiscal Q2 Earnings Snapshot
articles.summary: HP Inc. (HPQ) reported fiscal second-quarter net income of $450 million, or 49 cents per share, surpassing Wall Street's expectations. Adjusted earnings were 86 cents per share, beating the average analyst estimate of 72 cents. The personal computer and printer maker also exceeded revenue forecasts, posting $14.41 billion against an expected $13.92 billion, and provided positive earnings guidance for the current quarter and full year.
articles.content: HP Inc. (HPQ) reported fiscal second-quarter net income of $450 million, or 49 cents per share, surpassing Wall Street's expectations. Adjusted earnings were 86 cents per share, beating the average analyst estimate of 72 cents. The personal computer and printer maker also exceeded revenue forecasts, posting $14.41 billion against an expected $13.92 billion, and provided positive earnings guidance for the current quarter and full year.

articles.title: ‘I’m unsure of the best approach’: My father, 91, is in hospice care. He left his six children CDs. Can we cash out?
articles.summary: “His banker suggested that it might be easier after my father’s passing if we liquidate all of the CDs.”
articles.content: “His banker suggested that it might be easier after my father’s passing if we liquidate all of the CDs.”

articles.title: Director at EOG Resources (NYSE: EOG) receives 1,541-share stock award
articles.summary: EOG Resources director Charles R. Crisp was granted 1,541 shares of EOG common stock on May 26, 2026, categorized as a "grant, award, or other acquisition." This award increased his direct holdings to 65,047.258 shares, with a grant price of $0.00 per share, as detailed in a Form 4 SEC filing. The transaction was not an open-market purchase and reflects a compensation-related award.

articles.title: Ecolab CFO to brief analysts via June 2 William Blair webcast
articles.summary: Ecolab (NYSE: ECL) CFO Scott Kirkland will address financial analysts at the William Blair Annual Growth Stock Conference on Tuesday, June 2, 2026. A webcast of his 30-minute presentation will be available at 10:00 AM CT on Ecolab's investor website, with a replay accessible until September 2, 2026. Ecolab is a global leader in water, hygiene, and infection prevention solutions, serving customers in over 170 countries.
